projects.title: Cosmo
projects.description: A playful orbit simulator and mission log UI: watch bodies drift, pin events, and share snapshots as tiny postcards from deep space.
features: Interactive orbit simulator with draggable bodies
Mission log for pinning events and revisiting milestones
Snapshot postcards you can share from deep space
Canvas-backed rendering with a calm cosmic UI

projects.title: Artiscii
projects.description: Turn photos and vector hints into layered ASCII compositions with palettes, dithering, and export presets for terminals and the web.
features: Photo and vector driven ASCII composition
Palettes, dithering, and layered export presets
Terminal and web export workflows
WebGL preview with a Rust / WASM core

projects.title: Cooksie
projects.description: Recipe boxes that behave like playlists: scale servings, swap diets, and auto-build grocery lists from overlapping ingredients.
features: Recipe collections that behave like playlists
Scale servings and swap diets without losing structure
Grocery lists built from overlapping ingredients
Auth and data layer ready for Supabase

projects.title: Solace
projects.description: A travel guide app that helps users plan their trips for them.
features: Gemini API to generate travel plans.
Ambient soundscapes with soft visual timing cues
Haptics-friendly patterns without harsh alarms
Session presets you can start in one tap

projects.title: Fintor
projects.description: A stock market stimulatpr that lets users learn about the stock market and invest in stocks without spending a dime.
features: Stock market prices in real time using Finnhub API.
Supabase for database and authentication.
Leaderboard and rewards system to motivate users to invest.

projects.title: Tagit
projects.description: A chrome extension that sorts your email into tasks, calendar events and other categories.
features: Categorize emails into tasks, calendar events and other categories.
Personalized to the user preferences and priorities.
Uses the Gmail API to get the emails and the Google Calendar API to get the calendar events.
